title: Fix intermittent crash when opening 'Start Anonymously' after navigating through Login/Chat

requirements.text: Eliminate the intermittent "Something unexpected happened" crash when the user clicks "Start Anonymously" after navigating through the login flow and the anonymous chat experience, ensuring the Experience view always opens reliably.

quotes: now the start anonymously page wont open, shows something unexpected happened
most recent, starting page after i try to go into the login page and through the chat page

acceptanceCriteria: From the landing page, clicking "Start Anonymously" always opens the Experience view without triggering the global ErrorBoundary screen.
After entering the login flow (Internet Identity choice screen and/or local auth screen) and visiting the Anonymous Chat tab, clicking "Start Anonymously" again reliably opens the Experience view.
QA can repeat the navigation path multiple times (including browser back) without intermittent failures.

requirements.text: Make landing/experience navigation state robust by keeping the UI state in MindVaultLandingPage in sync with browser history state during open/close and back navigation (including repeated open/close cycles).
acceptanceCriteria: Closing the Experience view returns the user to the landing view without leaving history/state in an inconsistent condition.
Using the browser back button after opening the Experience view returns to the landing view without triggering an error screen.
Repeated cycles of open Experience -> navigate within Experience (login/chat) -> close/back -> open Experience do not accumulate invalid history states.

requirements.text: Improve diagnostics for this crash by capturing and surfacing the underlying runtime error details when the ErrorBoundary is hit (while keeping user-facing copy in English and unchanged in meaning).
acceptanceCriteria: When the ErrorBoundary renders, the console includes the original error plus enough context to debug navigation (at minimum: current URL, history.state, whether Experience was intended to be open).
Clicking "Try Again" results in a deterministic recovery behavior (either successfully re-rendering the app state or performing a full reload), instead of returning to a broken state.

constraints: Do not edit files under frontend/src/components/ui (read-only shadcn components).
Do not edit immutable hook entrypoints listed by SYSTEM_CONTEXT (compose around them instead).
Keep all backend logic in the single Motoko actor (no new backend services).
nonGoals: Do not add new authentication providers beyond Internet Identity and existing local auth.
Do not redesign the marketing/landing page content beyond what is necessary to fix navigation reliability.
Do not change mood template/preset functionality as part of this fix unless it is directly implicated in the crash.
